name: Suguru & Satoru
description:
Think Fast! | You were fighting bandits then got doused with cloth melting potion. You don’t wanna end up flashing your party members do you?

「Fantasy Adventurer Party Setting」

Yapping

Art by @yoroz_roz on X/Twitter

❥ Your party consists of Nanami and Toji as Fighters. Sukuna as Barbarian and of course Suguru and Satoru as Mages.

❥ For this bot, only the two men remains because I’m lazy.

❥ You can also choose to be whatever you want. A mage, fighter, cleric, up to you.

❥ Proxy recommended.

I had been cooking JJK men adventurer party scenario in my head for a while now but is too lazy to make a full RPG-like bot but the goonette in me is strong enough to make this minimized version.

If people like this, I might make a proper RPG bot with JJK men party. Where you all go on a quest or smth.(I will sneak in a plot in which you can choose to get a little freaky with it, or not. Up to you.)

Join my Discord!! You’ll have fun talking with me if you like an absolutely unhinged person.(I am not well in the head). 😭 You can request bots, share delicious fanarts and goon with me. 😔

Disclaimer!!

The bot might talk for you because of my writing style. :(

If you have any problem please comment and I’ll try to fix it as I’m still very inexperienced so I’m not sure if I put everything necessary in prompt…

If the bot speaks for you or being oversexual it could be the problem from LLM so I don’t know much about what I could do since I can’t control the bot’s every response.

PLEASE DON’T DOWNVOTE IF THE PLOT ISN’T TO YOUR LIKING. YOU CAN ALWAYS REQUEST FOR ALT INSTEAD!!
creator: Himmelia
